query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN principal ELSE 0 END) AS sum_principal,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN interest ELSE 0 END) AS sum_interest,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN fee ELSE 0 END) AS sum_fee,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN penalty ELSE 0 END) AS sum_penalty,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN unlock_fee ELSE 0 END) AS sum_unlock_fee,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN discount ELSE 0 END) AS sum_discount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN overpaid ELSE 0 END) AS sum_overpaid,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 1 THEN bad_debt ELSE 0 END) AS sum_bad_debt,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN total_amount ELSE bad_debt END) AS total_paid
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365';

  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN penalty ELSE 0 END) AS sum_penalty,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN unlock_fee ELSE 0 END) AS sum_unlock_fee,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN discount ELSE 0 END) AS sum_discount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN overpaid ELSE 0 END) AS sum_overpaid,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 1 THEN bad_debt ELSE 0 END) AS sum_bad_debt,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN total_amount ELSE bad_debt END) AS total_paid
FROM debt_collected_cache
